# MedCoach

## About
MedCoach is a UK medical school interview coaching service run by two second-year medical students at Peninsula Medical School, Plymouth. Founded by Stefan Moore and Lochana S., MedCoach offers 1-to-1 interview coaching, mock interviews, and comprehensive study guides for students applying to UK medical schools. Between the two founders, they received 6 offers from 6 interviews across Peninsula, Leicester, Newcastle, and Keele. MedCoach is rated 5.0 stars on Google. Sessions start from £25.

## Services and Pricing
- 1-to-1 Personalised Interview Coaching: £45/hour. Fully tailored to the student's profile, school-specific prep, live Q&A, written session notes included.
- Mock Interview: £50/hour. Full simulated interview matched to the student's chosen school format (MMI or panel), full written feedback report included.
- 2x Interview Coaching Bundle: £80 (save £10). Two 1-to-1 coaching hours.
- 2x Mock Interview Bundle: £90 (save £10). Two full mock interviews.
- Complete Med School PDF Pack: £25 (75% off, normally £100). 10 comprehensive guides covering every stage of a medical school application. Includes: How to Get Into Medical School guide, Interview Masterclass, 50 MMI Question Bank with model answers, Medical School Comparison Guide (21 schools), Personal Statement and UCAS Guide, NHS Hot Topics 2026, UCAT Guide, Work Experience Guide, A-Level Subject Guide, Gap Year and Reapplication Guide. Instant PDF delivery.
- All-In Package: £95 (save £100, normally £195). Includes 1x personalised coaching session, 1x school-specific mock interview, and the full 10-guide PDF bundle free.

## Locations
- Online only. All sessions delivered via Zoom. Available to students anywhere in the UK.

## Contact
- Website: https://medcoach.uk
- Email: stefanmoore@medcoach.uk
- Booking: https://calendly.com/stefanmoore-medcoach
- Google Reviews: https://g.page/r/CfgdWnROlmKJEAI/review

## Service Area
UK-wide (online delivery). Specialises in England-specific medical school applications including Peninsula, Leicester, Newcastle, Keele, and all other UK medical schools.

## Key Facts
- 5.0 star rating on Google Reviews.
- Founders received 6 offers from 6 medical school interviews.
- Both tutors are current Year 2 medical students at Peninsula Medical School, Plymouth.
- Sessions start from £25.
- Coaching covers both MMI and panel interview formats.
- School-specific preparation available for all 21+ UK medical schools.
- Written feedback reports provided after every mock interview.
- Free 5 MMI question taster pack available on the website.
- 10 comprehensive PDF study guides covering every stage of the application process.
- Instant PDF delivery after purchase.

## What Makes Us Different
MedCoach is run by current medical students who sat these exact interviews two years ago, not graduates who interviewed 5 to 10 years ago. That means the advice is based on what actually works now, not outdated strategies. Every session is tailored to the student's target schools, not generic one-size-fits-all content. Students book directly with their tutor with no middlemen, no corporate call centres, and no being assigned to whoever is available. Pricing starts at £25, significantly cheaper than large coaching companies that charge £100 to £200+ per hour.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### How much does MedCoach cost?
Sessions start from £25 for the complete PDF study guide bundle. 1-to-1 coaching is £45/hour, mock interviews are £50/hour, and the All-In Package (coaching + mock + all guides) is £95. No hidden fees or subscriptions.

### Who are the tutors?
Stefan Moore and Lochana S., both current second-year medical students at Peninsula Medical School. Between them they received 6 offers from 6 interviews across Peninsula, Leicester, Newcastle, and Keele.

### Do you cover my specific medical school?
Yes. MedCoach provides school-specific preparation for all UK medical schools. Mock interviews are matched to the exact format of your chosen school, whether that is MMI or panel.

### How are sessions delivered?
All sessions are delivered online via Zoom. This means students anywhere in the UK can access coaching without travelling.

### What do I get after a mock interview?
Every mock interview includes a full written feedback report covering your strengths, areas for improvement, and specific advice for interview day.

### Is the PDF bundle worth it?
The Complete Med School Pack includes 10 guides covering A-levels, UCAS, personal statements, UCAT, work experience, interview prep, 50 MMI stations with model answers, NHS hot topics, school comparisons, and gap year advice. It costs £25 (normally £100) and is delivered instantly after purchase.

### How far in advance should I book?
Book as early as possible. Spaces fill up quickly during peak interview season (October to March). The earlier you start preparing, the more confident you will be on interview day.

### Can I get a free taster before booking?
Yes. MedCoach offers a free pack of 5 MMI ethics questions with model answers and examiner insight, available on the website with no credit card required.
